ast.name: warn
ast.source: %s(...) is deprecated in plain JavaScript React classes. %s
ast.target: %s(...) 在纯 JavaScript React 类中已弃用。%s

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Using Maps as children is not supported. Use an array of keyed ReactElements instead.
ast.target: 不支持将 Map 用作子元素。请改用带键的 ReactElement 数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `displayName` on Context.Consumer has no effect. You should set it directly on the context with Context.displayName = '%s'.
ast.target: 在 Context.Consumer 上设置 `displayName` 无效。您应该直接在上下文上设置，例如 Context.displayName = '%s'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: React.createFactory() is deprecated and will be removed in a future major release. Consider using JSX or use React.createElement() directly instead.
ast.target: React.createFactory() 已弃用，并将在未来的主版本中移除。请考虑使用 JSX 或直接使用 React.createElement()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Factory.type is deprecated. Access the class directly before passing it to createFactory.
ast.target: Factory.type 已弃用。请在传递给 createFactory 之前直接访问该类。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected a large number of updates inside startTransition. If this is due to a subscription please re-write it to use React provided hooks. Otherwise concurrent mode guarantees are off the table.
ast.target: 检测到在 startTransition 内部有大量更新。如果这是由于订阅引起的，请重写以使用 React 提供的 hooks。否则，并发模式的保证将失效。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths of the same length
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径长度相同

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths to be the same except for the deepest key
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径除了最深层的键外其余部分相同

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hydrate through createRoot is deprecated. Use ReactDOMClient.hydrateRoot(container, <App />) instead.
ast.target: 通过 createRoot 进行水合已弃用。请改用 ReactDOMClient.hydrateRoot(container, <App />)。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Please use `getNodesBounds` from `useReactFlow`/`useSvelteFlow` hook to ensure correct values for sub flows. If not possible, you have to provide a nodeLookup to support sub flows.
ast.target: 请使用 `useReactFlow`/`useSvelteFlow` hook 中的 `getNodesBounds` 以确保子流程的值正确。如果不可行，您必须提供一个 nodeLookup 来支持子流程。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] The `destroy` method will be unsupported in a future version. Instead use unsubscribe function returned by subscribe. Everything will be garbage-collected if store is garbage-collected.
ast.target: [已弃用] `destroy` 方法在未来的版本中将不受支持。请改用 subscribe 返回的 unsubscribe 函数。如果 store 被垃圾回收，所有内容都将被垃圾回收。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Spark requires a engine process to handle AI requests. The engine runs locally and processes your commands.
ast.target: Spark 需要一个引擎进程来处理 AI 请求。该引擎在本地运行并处理你的命令。

ast.source: Install it globally on your system
ast.target: 在你的系统上全局安装它

ast.source: Add the command to your path
ast.target: 将命令添加到你的路径中

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can manage the engine from plugin settings at any time.
ast.target: 你可以随时在插件设置中管理引擎。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 或者通过运行以下命令手动安装：

ast.name: text

ast.target: 或者在你的终端中运行此命令：

ast.target: 这将删除该代理及其所有设置。
